title: Gravitee APIM
description: Visualize API request metrics, logs, and gateway-level metrics from Gravitee APIM (API Management).

definition.title: APIs by Average Response Times (excl: websockets & webhooks)
Max Latency Times (by Gateway and Endpoint)
(V2 & V4 API) Requests by Response Times

search.query: (@entrypointResponse.status:([400 TO 499] OR [500 TO 599]) OR @clientResponse.status:([400 TO 499] OR [500 TO 599])) $apiname
(@entrypointResponse.status:([100 TO 199] OR [300 TO 399]) OR @clientResponse.status:([100 TO 199] OR [300 TO 399])) $apiname
